title: Freedom of choice
doc_html:
§983.  Freedom of choice

No person shall be required, as a condition of employment, to become or remain a member of any labor organization, or to pay any dues, fees, assessments, or other charges of any kind to a labor organization.

Added by Acts 1976, No. 97, §1.
doc_text:
§983.  Freedom of choice
No person shall be required, as a condition of employment, to become or remain a member of any labor organization, or to pay any dues, fees, assessments, or other charges of any kind to a labor organization.
Added by Acts 1976, No. 97, §1.
